title: VintageHauled
description: Inspired by the games Flintforge and Vintage Story. Planned to add intricate crafting and progression to each part of the game, making it feel like a whole new start and game.

# **Official Multiplayer Server**

![pnc3.net logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e942aa9cc088e9860f2f52130c5f991f8cd5d1_0.webp)

Website: [Here](https://www.pnc3.net/)

Ip: pnc3.net

Play 'The Ages' which uses VintageHauled on pnc3.net

This server is for 1.21.11+

## **Roughly 40% Complete**

## **Simplified Description**

Basically, the gathering part and almost all other aspects of the game are different to make a more survival focused experience. Makes the game feel fresh. Based off of [Vintage Story](https://www.vintagestory.at/) and [Flintforge](https://jeyers-development.itch.io/flintforge).

**ADD THIS IN WORLD SELECTION SCREEN, NOT AFTER!**

## **Description**

You start off with not being able to mine trees, having to have rock tools that suck to then having to chisel out a trash pick to just mine slowly through granite to hopefully get copper, to eventually get a copper pick and being basically at the stone level in Minecraft. Adds a strong level of difficulty and a small grind to the game.

Completed In Recent Update: Bronze Age, Iron Age, Gun System and RPG

Planned: Thirst Mechanic, More Guns, Diamond Age?, then Netherite?.

This will certainly add some spice and difficult to the survival experience.

## **WORKS GREAT ON MULTIPLAYER** ##
